daily.today_energy: The cosmos is giving you permission to be authentically weird today. Trust your unconventional instincts—they're basically your superpower right now. Something unexpected could actually turn out to be exactly what you needed.
daily.love: Your vibe is magnetic when you stop trying so hard. Whether you're single or coupled up, lean into genuine conversations over surface-level small talk. Someone's definitely noticing the real you.
daily.career: Your innovative ideas are hitting different today. This is your moment to pitch that thought that's been living in your head. The universe is supporting bold moves that align with your authentic vision.
daily.health: Your energy feels scattered—ground yourself with something tactile. A walk, some music, or even just touching grass can recalibrate your nervous system. Honor what your body's asking for without overthinking it.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, bringing clarity to situations that felt foggy. You're entering a phase where your intuition is basically your superpower. Trust the weird hunches—they're actually onto something real.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, this is a week for deeper conversations that actually hit different. Single? Someone might slide into your orbit who gets your vibe. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked this week. Ideas you've been sitting on are ready to breathe. Collaboration feels natural, so don't sleep on teamwork. The universe is basically saying your work matters.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not forced productivity. Moving in ways that feel good (not what the algorithm says) will shift your whole energy. Hydration and sleep are underrated manifestation tools.
